title: Creative Content & Social Media Assistant
description:
Creative Content & Social Media Assistant (Full-Time, Remote)

We are a European digital studio dedicated to creating environments where stories can live. Currently, we are focused on building Lunebi, a premium, ad-free mobile app that helps busy parents maintain magical, uninterrupted evening routines with their children.



We are looking for someone who is completely at home in the digital world. In the past, we hired people who were great at blindly following instructions, but they lacked a "feel" for the brand. We don't just want a robot, but we do need someone who can follow the rules. We need a highly self-sufficient, creative problem-solver who deeply understands our mission, has a strong aesthetic eye, and can meticulously execute our workflows.



WHY THIS JOB IS DIFFERENT



Growth Partner: We aren't just looking for an employee; we are looking for a long-term partner. As our startup scales and succeeds, your role, responsibilities, and salary will grow right alongside us.



We Pay Weekly: You get paid $125 USD every Friday. We believe in reliable cash flow for our team.



Autonomy & Respect: We do not micromanage. We will give you structured Step-by-Step Video Guides (SOPs) for the basics, but we expect you to take initiative, use your own judgment, and figure things out when a guide doesn't cover everything.



No "Probationary" Pay Cut: We respect your time and pay the full professional salary from Day 1.



We Pay for Tests: If we ask you to complete a trial task during the hiring process, we pay you for it.



THE ROLE

You will be the creative operational engine behind our brand's online presence.



Content & Video Creation: Using the newest digital and AI tools to generate a wide mix of content. Especially in these early days, you will need to balance creating fast-paced, engaging videos for TikTok/Reels with curating a calming, aesthetic "safe-space" vibe for our Instagram and Pinterest.



Social Media & Community Management: Coming up with fresh, engaging ideas and using modern AI tools (like ChatGPT or Gemini) to bring those ideas to life. You will manage our social profiles and actively reply to comments from parents in a highly empathetic tone.



Following Guides (SOPs): While we value your creative input, we also have proven processes. It is absolutely critical that you can simply and meticulously follow our structured, step-by-step video guides when they are provided.



Independent Problem Solving: You will be working while our European founders might be offline. If you get stuck, you don't just stop and wait for hours. You Google it, you test a workaround, and you keep moving forward.



REQUIREMENTS (Please read carefully)



Impeccable Written English: Because you will be writing posts and replying directly to our community of parents, your written English must be fluent, natural, and capable of holding a warm, empathetic tone.



The "Digital Native": You are extremely comfortable with the latest tech tools. You don't get lost in new software interfaces. You adapt quickly.



Detail-Oriented & Creative: You understand what makes a social media post look good across different platforms, but you are also disciplined enough to follow exact instructions without missing a step.



Self-Sufficient: You know how to troubleshoot and act independently when your manager is unavailable.



Full-Time Focus: You must NOT have another full-time job or be a full-time university student. We require your exclusive professional focus for 40 hours per week.



Professional Setup: You must have a working laptop, a stable primary internet connection, and a reliable backup internet plan (e.g., mobile data hotspot) for emergencies.



COMPENSATION & SCHEDULE



Salary: $500 USD / Month (Paid out as $125 Weekly).



Raise Potential: Performance review after Month 3 with the potential to increase to $600/month. As a partner in our growth, further raises will align with the company's success.



13th Month Pay: Included for long-term staff.



Holidays: You will follow standard Philippine national holidays.



Schedule: Flexible 8-hour shifts, but you must overlap 4 hours of your shift with European mornings (approximately 3:00 PM - 7:00 PM Philippine Time).



HOW TO APPLY

Please reply to this posting with the exact subject line "Creative Digital Native" and include a short introduction about yourself.



Then, answer these 3 specific questions:



Your Taste & Experience: What is your experience with coming up with social media ideas and using modern/AI tools to execute them across platforms like TikTok, Instagram, or Pinterest? (Please link 1 or 2 examples of visual content you like or have created).



Problem Solving: Imagine you are working on an urgent video, but the software you normally use is completely down and I am asleep so you cannot ask me what to do. What is your exact step-by-step reaction?



Logistics: Can you confirm you do not have another job/university classes, and can you provide a Speedtest.net link + confirm your backup internet method?

title: Credit Repair Disputer
description:
We are seeking a knowledgeable and motivated Credit Repair Specialist to join our team and assist clients in improving their credit profiles. As a Credit Repair Specialist, you will be responsible for analyzing credit reports, identifying negative items, developing strategies to improve credit scores, and working directly with credit bureaus to resolve inaccuracies or outdated information.



In addition, you will actively communicate with clients through our Skool community platform. This includes posting regular updates on client results, sharing important company news, and engaging with clients by answering questions and providing guidance within the community.



This position requires excellent communication, attention to detail, and a strong understanding of credit laws and consumer rights, including the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).

title: Real Estate Media Virtual Assistant (Photo Editing/Quality Control)
description:
US-based real estate photography company is looking for a full-time Virtual Assistant to support us with day-to-day operational tasks, including putting photos in walkthrough order, adding property lines, creating virtual twilights, adjusting photo edits in Photoshop/Lightroom, and ensuring all projects are delivered on time.



We are looking for someone who is smart, organized, reliable, efficient, friendly, motivated, and excited to grow with us! If you’re a hardworking person who takes feedback well and pays close attention to details, we’d love to meet you. If you have experience editing real estate photos, this would be a big pro.



This is a long-term role for someone who’s ready to take on more responsibility over time and become a key part of our journey.



WORK HOURS

Full-time, 2pm to 10pm Pacific Time (5am - 1pm Manila time) is our preferred schedule, but this can be a little bit flexible



STARTING SALARY: $4-5/hour



Who We Are:



Inside Media is a family-run real estate media company based in Spokane, WA. We create beautiful photo and video content for realtors, and we’re known for our fast turnaround, friendly service, and high-quality work. Our team is growing quickly and looking for our next project coordinator to help us maintain our quality and turnaround standards.



Job Summary



Manage, review for quality, upload, and retouch photos on a daily basis. Ensure projects are delivered on time, and follow up with editors as needed. Maintain communication with admin team.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Project Management

Quality Control for Deliverables (Photos, Videos, 3D Tours)

Make edits to photos in Photoshop/Lightroom as needed

Communicate with Admin team on deliveries



SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS



Ability to take on several tasks at once.

Extreme attention to detail.

Excellent written English.

Proficient in Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Lightroom, Slack.

Fast learner and willing to learn

Tech-savvy - comfortable with quickly learning new software

title: Meta Ads Expert for Fast-Growing E-commerce Brand (Result-Driven Only)
description:
The Mission:

We are Lunavia, a Dutch eco-luxury hair & body care brand. 

We are a startup aiming to become market leader in 10 years.  

Our creative is converting, but we need a technical Meta Ads expert to manage the machine, fix our tracking, and scale our winners.



What we are NOT looking for:



Planners who love to talk but hate to execute.



People who need 2 weeks to "analyze" before launching a single ad.

"Account managers" who work for agencies. I want a partner, not a middleman.



What we ARE looking for:



The Technical Wizard: You know exactly how to set up Conversions API (CAPI) and GTM for a WooCommerce store. 

You understand that data accuracy is the backbone of scaling.



The Scaler: You know how to take a winning ad and scale it to the moon without breaking the ROAS.



The Communicator: You are proactive. 

You don't wait for me to ask for updates. 

You tell me what you did, why you did it, and what the results are.



Your Responsibilities:



Fix the Data: Align our Meta Ads Manager data with our actual sales. 

Fix tracking gaps immediately.



Execute & Optimize: Manage Advantage+ campaigns, CBO/ABO structures, and creative testing.



Scale: Maintain a target ROAS while aggressively increasing spend on winners.



Tell us what content you need on time. (we have a lot allready)



Be honest in your feedback.



Why work with us?



Direct communication with the owner (no corporate BS).



Fast decision-making. 

If you need a budget or a new creative, you get it.



Performance Bonus: Hit our monthly targets? You get a bonus. 

We grow, you grow.



?? IMPORTANT: HOW TO APPLY (The Filter)

To prove you are an A-player and not just copy-pasting, your application MUST include:



A screenshot or case study of a WooCommerce account you managed. 

Show me the Spend vs. ROAS.



Answer this: "Our dashboard data in the browser differs from the mobile app. 

What is the first technical thing you would check/fix to solve this?"



Type the word "SIGNAL" at the top of your message so I know you read this entire post.



Applications without the word "SIGNAL" or the answer to the technical question will not be read.

title: Performance media buyer
description:
We are looking for a performance-driven media buyer to help scale our paid advertising, primarily on Meta Ads Manager. Who are we? Golden Grip is a premium fitness brand focused on grip strength, forearm training, and armwrestling equipment.

- Spend €10K–€20K/month on ads

- Have proven products and creatives

- Understand our audience and positioning



We need someone who can scale what works, improve efficiency, bring structure, and take on the operational work inside the ad manager.



Your key responsibilities would be:

- Campaign management and scaling

- Testing and identifying winning patterns

- Creative collaboration: work with our team on ad creatives, hooks, concepts, etc.

- Performance tracking and monitoring our key metric. We use TripleWhale for attribution, having experience with this is a plus.

- Risk management: following Meta best practices and work within platform policies to avoid account restrictions.



You are a good fit if:

- Proven experience managing €10+ monthly ad spend

- Strong understanding of Meta ads in 2026 landscape

- Experience scaling international ecommerce D2C brands

- Having affinity with fitness / strength sports is a huge plus

- You have a good feel for marketing strategy and understand all the ins and outs about attribution, key metrics, etc.



The job role would be part-time to start, but can evolve to more hours depending on your performance and skill sets.



Payment is based on a fixed monthly/hourly fee, depending on your experience. Performance bonuses could be discussed.



To apply, please answer:

- What is the highest monthly ad spend you’ve managed?

- Share 2–3 brands you’ve scaled and the results achieved

- How do you structure a new ad account for scaling?

- What is your approach to creative testing?



Looking forward to working together!

title: Senior/Lead Developer -- Build a TMS From Scratch
description:
Lead Developer -- Build a TMS From Scratch



Pinnacle Logistics Group | Remote (Philippines-based, US hours) | Full-Time



We're a $35M tech-enabled freight brokerage based in Phoenix, AZ. We move freight across LTL, truckload, ocean, drayage, and Mexico cross-border. We're building our own transportation management system (TMS) called FlowTMS, and we need someone to own it.



This isn't a maintenance role. There's no legacy codebase to inherit. You're building the entire platform from zero -- architecture, data model, API layer, UI, deployment, all of it. You'll work directly with the President of Operations and have full ownership of technical decisions, including the tech stack.





What you're building:



FlowTMS is the operating system for our brokerage. It handles quoting, shipment management, carrier matching, tracking, invoicing, and reporting across all our service lines. You'll be designing and shipping production features from day one, not writing specs for someone else to build.





What we're looking for:



- You've built something from scratch before. Not maintained, not contributed to -- built. We want to see a project where you made the architecture decisions and shipped it.

- Strong in React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Experience with Next.js, PostgreSQL, and cloud deployment (AWS, Vercel, or similar) is a plus.

- You can communicate clearly. You'll be working US hours with a US-based leadership team. That means real-time collaboration, explaining trade-offs on calls, and asking good questions. Strong spoken and written English is a must.

- You're comfortable making decisions with incomplete information. We'll give you the business context and the problems to solve. You figure out how to build it.

- You don't need to be managed. Weekly check-ins, not daily standups. Ownership, not tickets.





What you get:



- Full ownership of a greenfield product at a fast-growing company

- You choose the tech stack. We'll build whatever environment you need to be successful.

- Unlimited Claude Code Enterprise access

- Direct line to leadership -- no layers of middle management

- Competitive salary

- A team that actually ships. We're not a company that talks about building things. We build them.





How to apply:



Send a message with:

1. A short video introduction explaining why this role is a good fit for you

2. A link to something you built from scratch (GitHub, live app, case study -- whatever shows your work)

3. A short note on how you'd approach building a TMS if you were starting today

4. Your expected monthly salary

title: Full-Time Executive & Personal Assistant
description:
About the role

I am a busy founder and business owner based in Ontario, Canada, looking for a highly organised, proactive, and reliable Executive and Personal Assistant to become my right hand — both in business and in life.



This is not a task-based VA role. You will be deeply integrated into how I run my day. That means managing my business operations and my personal life equally — from supplier
s to dinner reservations with family, from vendor follow-ups to making sure my bills are paid and my schedule is structured the way I need it. If it is on my plate, it is on yours.



I am looking for someone who thinks three steps ahead, communicates without being prompted, and takes full ownership of their responsibilities. This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with a founder, not just complete tasks.



What you will do

- Own my calendar completely — schedule meetings, structure my day intentionally, block personal commitments (family dinners, social plans, personal time), and resolve conflicts before I notice them

- Plan my day proactively — not just what is on the calendar, but ensuring the day flows logically and my priorities are protected

- Manage my
 inbox — triage, prioritise, draft responses, and ensure nothing is missed or delayed

- Handle personal administrative tasks — bill payments, subscriptions, reminders, and household coordination

- Call service providers on my behalf — insurance companies, utility companies, subscription services, and billing departments — to resolve issues, negotiate, or get information

- Plan and coordinate travel — flights, hotels, ground transport, and detailed itineraries

- Support business admin — order tracking, supplier and vendor communications, and documentation

- Update and maintain CRM trackers and records accurately

- Draft professional correspondence and communications on my behalf

- Build and maintain SOPs for recurring tasks so nothing depends on memory



A typical day might include

- Reviewing my upcoming day and structuring it so my priorities are in the right order

- Triaging overnight
s and flagging the two or three that need my attention today

- Calling an insurance company to resolve a billing discrepancy on my behalf

- Booking a dinner reservation and coordinating availability with family

- Following up with a vendor on an outstanding order

- Updating the CRM tracker with current client or lead status

- Paying a bill due this week and confirming it is processed



What I am looking for

- Minimum 2 years of experience as an executive assistant, personal assistant, or senior admin role

- C2 English: Excellent written and spoken English — professional, warm, and clear

- Naturally proactive and organised — you anticipate needs rather than waiting to be told

- Comfortable making calls to Canadian companies on behalf of a business owner

- Strong experience with Google Workspace and/or Microsoft 365

- Comfortable managing personal finances and life admin, not just business tasks

- Reliable internet and a quiet, professional work environment

- Available during Canadian Eastern Time business hours, or with significant overlap



What makes this role different

- You work directly with the founder — no layers, no bureaucracy

- Your work matters immediately and visibly every single day

- I am not rotating assistants — I want someone who grows with me long-term

- I pay on time, every month, without exception



Applications that do not follow the instructions below will not be reviewed. Attention to detail is the single most important quality I am hiring for.

Question 1

Give me one specific example of a time you managed a complex or conflicting schedule. What was the situation, what did you do, and what was the result?



Question 2

I have back-to-back meetings all morning. An urgent
 arrives from a vendor requiring a response today. Walk me through exactly what you would do.



Question 3

This role includes managing my personal life — family dinners, social plans, bill payments, and calling service companies on my behalf. Are you comfortable with that level of access and responsibility? Describe how you have handled personal admin for someone before.



At the very end of your message, write the word "pineapple" on its own line. Do not explain it.

title: Real Estate Agent Outreach Specialist
description:
Five Star Home Solutions is a nationwide, top-tier, real estate investment company (iBuyer) specializing in acquiring off-market properties.  We are seeking a high-performing Real Estate Agent Outreach Specialist to connect with licensed real estate agents and introduce them to our free platform that helps real estate agents earn 3-4X more income per property.  This is not a transactional sales role, this is an opportunity to build a network of agents that generates long term income. 



The ideal DISC style is a High D / High I: someone who is driven, takes initiative, customer service oriented, enjoys talking with people, and requires minimal hand holding. This person should be able to work independently and work aggressively to connect with real estate agents and share our opportunities.  



Key Responsibilities



- Call real estate agents using provided lists

- Introduce our company by making offers on their current listings

- Transition the conversation into our agent partnership opportunity

- Explain how agents can earn more through our platform

- Get agents signed up (100% free, simple process)

- Build relationships and stay top of mind



Every agent you bring on becomes part of your long term pipeline (affiliate network).  This role allows you to build a portfolio of agents that continues generating income as they transact - creating a scalable, repeatable revenue stream tied to your efforts.



Success Metrics



- Number of calls made

- Number of conversations with agents

- Number of agents signed up on our platform



This is a high-activity role - consistent outreach drives results



The Ideal Candidate



- Confident and engaging on the phone

- Able to quickly build rapport with professionals

- Consistent, disciplined, and self-motivated

- Comfortable with high daily call volume

- Motivated by both immediate income and long-term upside



Training & Onboarding



We provide a structured onboarding experience to set you up for success:



- Self-paced, video-based training covering our opportunities and platform

- One-on-one coaching during the first 30 days

- Ongoing access to proven systems, frameworks, coaching, and support



Success in this role is driven by execution, consistency, and coachability.



Qualifications & Experience



- 2-3+ years of real estate experience or familiarity with the industry (agents, listings, etc)

- Sales experience, especially phone-based sales

- Strong verbal communication skills and follow-up skills

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

- Ability to take direction and execute consistently



Compensation



- Pay rate: $5-$6 per hour, based on experience, plus lucrative bonus for each agent partner deal.

- Schedule: 48 hours per week (It could be more based on workload)

- Training: Yes, training will be provided.



***If you are interested in applying for this position please include an introduction video that outlines who you are and your background (specifically any real estate experience), and why this role speaks to you and why you believe you’re the perfect person for the role.

title: Influencer Associate
description:
As our Influencer Associate, you'll be the operational backbone of our creator / influencer marketing program. You'll own the day-to-day processes that keep our creator partnerships running smoothly: from creator / influencer sourcing, initial DM outreach, relationship management, product sample coordination, data upkeep, and whitelisting requests. Your job is to make sure nothing falls through the cracks and that every creator / influencer touchpoint is logged in trackers and conversations are handled with precision and care.



This is a full-time, process-driven role where organization, attention to detail, proactive thinking, and high EQ (given conversations with creators/influencers) matter above all else. 



You don't just follow SOPs, you consistently look for ways to improve them based on your learnings from your work and from your conversations with creators. We need someone who thinks one to two steps ahead, keeps our internal systems spotless, and brings a sharp, solutions-oriented mindset to everything they touch.



## About immi:



immi is a better-for-you Asian American food brand that invented the world's first low-carb, high-protein, and 100% plant-based instant ramen. At immi, we're reimagining our favorite foods with added nutrition and high-quality ingredients to taste just as good as you remember.



immi is founded by Kevin Lee (KLee) & Kevin Chanthasiriphan (KChan) who previously spent the past decade working together as product managers and venture investors in the tech industry. We grew up working alongside our families in the markets of Taiwan and Thailand where making and eating noodles was a part of our everyday lives.



We're building immi to help our families better manage their health conditions arising from poor nutrition and unhealthy diets.



## Key Responsibilities



- **Creator Outreach & Relationship Management**

    - Identify, research, and reach out to potential influencer and creator partners across Instagram, TikTok, and Youtube. The primary focus initially will be on Instagram.

    - Manage ongoing communication with creators by responding promptly, following up consistently, and maintaining strong relationships

    - Coordinate product gifting / sampling, ensuring creators receive the right products on time, and following up to inform them of shipping updates

    - Encourage creators to share public posts after receiving product.

    - Serve as the primary point of contact for creators throughout the partnership lifecycle

    - Track and manage all outreach efforts, responses, and partnership statuses

- **Influencer Operations & Process Management**

    - Execute and manage influencer marketing SOPs end to end

    - Negotiate whitelisting rights with select influencers based on quality of post content and ensure creator accounts are properly set up for paid amplification

    - Coordinate product shipments with our operations team: manage shipping logistics, tracking, and delivery confirmations

    - Manage contracts, briefs, and deliverable timelines with creators

    - Flag any process gaps, bottlenecks, or inefficiencies and propose improvements

- **Data Management & Internal Systems**

    - Keep all influencer databases, spreadsheets, and CRM records up to date and meticulously organized

    - Log outreach activity, partnership details, content deliverables, and performance data

    - Maintain clean, consistent data hygiene across all internal tools and systems

    - Build and maintain tracking systems that give the team clear visibility into pipeline status

    - Generate reports and summaries on influencer program performance as needed

- **Process Improvement & Systems Thinking**

    - Continuously evaluate current workflows and SOPs for opportunities to improve speed, accuracy, or scalability

    - Proactively suggest and implement system upgrades, automations, or organizational improvements

    - Document new processes clearly so they can be followed and replicated by others

    - Think one to two steps ahead. Anticipate what's needed before it's asked for

- **Communication & Collaboration**

    - Communicate proactively with the team on project status, creator updates, and any blockers

    - Follow SOPs closely and flag any gaps or confusion early

    - Operate reliably in an async environment. Updates don't wait to be asked for

    - Collaborate cross-functionally with marketing, creative, and operations teams as needed



## Qualifications



- Highly organized with an ability to manage multiple creator relationships and tasks simultaneously without letting details slip

- Strong attention to detail. You catch the thing most people miss

- Sharp, intelligent, and solutions-oriented. You don't just identify problems, you fix them

- High EQ with the ability to maintain conversations with creators and build organic relationships over time

- Self-starter who takes initiative and figures things out without hand-holding

- Reliable setup: stable internet, consistent availability, dependable turnaround times

- Able to follow detailed SOPs to the letter, and improve them when you see an opportunity



## Required Skills



- Strong written communication. You can draft professional, personable outreach messages and keep conversations moving

- Excellent organizational and data management skills — spreadsheets, databases, and CRMs are second nature to you

- Process-driven mindset with the ability to manage end-to-end workflows independently

- Proactive communication. You keep people in the loop without being asked

- Comfortable managing logistics: shipping coordination, tracking, and follow-ups

- Consistent output: you hit deadlines, every time



## Preferred Skillsets



- Interest in or exposure to influencer marketing, creator culture, or social media

- Familiarity with social media platforms (TikTok, Meta, YouTube) and a general sense of how creator content works

- Experience working with food brands or in the food and beverage industry (a big plus, not required)

- Comfortable with async collaboration tools like Notion, Slack, or Google Workspace

- Quick to onboard, asks smart questions, and figures things out independently

- Naturally curious. You dig into how things work and look for ways to make them better

- "No task is too small" attitude. You take pride in clean, reliable work even when it's unglamorous

- Growth mindset: you're always looking for ways to do the job faster and better



## Work Environment



- Full-time position

- Working hours aligned with Pacific Standard Time (PST)

- Fully remote. Open to international applicants

- Async-first work environment with clear deliverables and turnaround expectations

- Fast-paced startup environment with opportunities for growth and impact



## immi Values



- **We cook together (team):**

    - We create an inclusive environment to care for each other.

    - We push each other to strive for excellence.

    - We own the failures; we share the successes.

- **We are executive chefs (ownership):**

    - We adopt an ownership mentality for both our work and the company.

    - We look to bring more solutions than problems.

    - We have a bias for action and we're not afraid to get our hands dirty.

- **We strive for 3 stars (impact):**

    - We push to complete initiatives that drive impact and results.

    - We're open minded to creative solutions that drive impact.

    - We prioritize with the big picture in mind.

- **We write recipes (writing):**

    - We scale through written words.

    - We write for clarity of thought and better decision making.

    - We document for clearer communication and reflection.

- **We cook in an open kitchen (openness):**

    - We build trust and accountability through open communication.

    - We embrace evidence, learn from failures, accept criticism, and are always prepared to change our opinions.

    - We have the humility to make ourselves better.



## How to Apply



- Complete this Typeform to finalize your application:
salary: $700 USD / Month paid in local currency

title: Acquisition Specialist – Elite Cold Caller & Solo Closer
description:
Acquisition Specialist – Elite Cold Caller & Solo Closer



(Single-Owner Pipeline | Zero Excuses | Pure Performance)



STOP.

Do not apply unless you are a proven, solo operator in high-volume outbound calling and direct closing. This is a role for disciplined producers only—no safety nets, no split roles, no tolerance for excuses.



About the Role



You will single-handedly drive the full acquisition cycle for distressed real estate deals (tax delinquent, inherited, title/condition problems, etc.). From the very first cold call to contract close, you are the only point of accountability—there are no handoffs, no account managers, no backstops.



Your success is measured daily, weekly, and monthly on three objective, transparent metrics:



Live cold call conversations (not just dials)



Qualified pipeline growth and management



Signed contracts (closed deals)



What You’ll Own



100+ Live Cold Call Conversations Daily: Only logged, real, two-way sales conversations count.



Immediate Qualification or Disqualification: No endless nurturing, no “relationship farming”—you work a fixed, black-and-white criteria set and move fast.



Full-Cycle Sales Execution: You negotiate, contract, and close each deal yourself. No one picks up your slack.



Total CRM Discipline: Every interaction, every note, every deal status tracked in real time—no exceptions.



Zero Tolerance for Missed Metrics: All activities and results are tracked, audited, and enforced daily. Fall short = out.



Who Thrives Here



Verified, high-output cold callers AND full-cycle closers (in real estate or equivalent asset class)



Transparent metric-sharers: You can instantly reference your highest daily call volume and your annual closed deals—with proof



Obsessed with documentation, accuracy, and pipeline hygiene



Crave direct, tough feedback; you adapt quickly and don’t personalize rejection



Perform best when pay is 100% tied to measurable output—no base, no cap, no politics



Immediate Disqualifiers



Missing resume or no metrics on call/deal volume



No voice memo or not following voice memo instructions (see below)



History of shared pipelines, team selling, or reluctance to own the entire sales process



Any record of missed quotas, weak reporting, or resistance to feedback



How to Apply (Strictly Enforced)



Resume: List outbound + closing experience with specific metrics:



Highest daily call volume



Total deals closed annually



Voice Memo (2-3 min, unscripted):



Your name, location, and highest ever cold call day



Brief story of a tough/distressed deal you closed: your steps and outcome



Your exact method for tracking calls, pipeline, and follow-up



The hardest feedback you’ve received—and what you changed after



Why you want an all-in, solo, performance-only sales seat



Any missing step = instant disqualification.



Do Not Apply If:



You don’t have both outbound and closing experience (with numbers)



You want ongoing “culture,” hand-holding, or daily coaching



You dislike strict process, documentation, or number-driven reviews



You prefer collaborative, shared, or “team” sales environments

title: Revit Families BIM Modeler (Remote)
description:
Company: RD Studio (rdstudio.co)

Employment Type: Full-Time Freelance

Location: Remote 



RD Studio is an international BIM content company known for high-quality Revit families used by thousands of architects worldwide. We are expanding our team and looking for a Revit Family Modeler who specializes in complex, highly parametric content.



(Note: We are specifically looking for advanced modelers. If you are a beginner or only build basic geometry without nested parameters, this role is not for you).



-----------------------------

? What You’ll Do



Build complex parametric content: Create professional, lightweight Revit families from scratch using nested families, complex formulas, and advanced constraints.

Maintain strict quality: Follow our internal BIM standards for geometry, parameters, materials, and visibility.

Draft diverse assets: Work on furniture, plumbing fixtures, lighting, electrical, structural, and more.

Collaborate efficiently: Manage your workflow using Asana, Google Sheets, and shared QA checklists.



-----------------------------

What We’re Looking For



Advanced Parametric Experience: Proven ability to build highly flexible families (portfolio and .RFA samples are required).

Technical Mastery: Deep understanding of shared parameters, reference planes, type catalogs, and mathematical/logical formulas.

Professional Organization: Ability to structure and name parameters cleanly and logically.

Work Ethic: Strong attention to detail, proactive problem-solving, and comfortable with English documentation.

Bonus: Experience modeling MEP or Structural content.



-----------------------------

Why Join Us?



100% Remote: Work from home with flexible hours.

Skill Growth: Get consistent feedback from industry experts to elevate your BIM skills.

Career Progression: Long-term collaboration with the potential to grow into a Senior Modeler or QA Leadership role.



-----------------------------

Location & Budget



This full-time freelance position is targeted toward candidates based in Southeast Asia (Philippines, Thailand, Myanmar, etc.), as our budget is benchmarked to competitive full-time freelance rates in these regions.





-----------------------------

How to Apply

1. Send an
 to 
 with the subject: Revit Family Modeler — [Your Name]

2. Please include:

---- A short introduction about your experience with complex parametric modeling.

---- Your portfolio (PDF or link).

---- 4–5 sample Revit families (.RFA format) demonstrating your highest level of parametric complexity.

---- Your current availability for full-time work.

title: Appointment Setter (Outbound Calls) – Remote | Full-Time - (Commission-Based)
description:
Company

Optimist Global Services



Optimist Global Services is a fast-growing remote call center providing outsourced customer support and appointment setting services for clients in the U.S. We operate with strong structure, performance standards, and long-term growth opportunities for our team members.



Job Summary

We are hiring Outbound Appointment Setters to support a high-volume campaign focused on booking qualified appointments for our client.



This role is ideal for someone who is confident on the phone, persuasive, professional, and able to follow a script while still sounding natural and engaging.



You will be responsible for calling leads, qualifying prospects, overcoming objections, and successfully scheduling appointments into the client’s calendar.





Key Responsibilities



As an Appointment Setter, your responsibilities include:



Making outbound calls to leads provided by the company

Following campaign scripts while maintaining a natural and professional tone

Qualifying prospects based on campaign requirements

Booking appointments accurately into the scheduling system

Handling objections and keeping the call moving forward

Updating notes and call outcomes in the CRM/dialer system

Maintaining daily call and appointment KPIs

Attending team coaching sessions and performance reviews

Ensuring all work is done with professionalism, integrity, and compliance

Required Skills & Qualifications

To be successful in this role, you must have:



Strong English communication skills (clear speaking voice)

Confidence making outbound calls and speaking with strangers

Sales mindset and ability to persuade without sounding pushy

Ability to follow scripts and adapt when needed

Basic computer skills (typing, navigating tabs, using CRM tools)

Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Ability to handle rejection and stay motivated

Strong attendance and punctuality (non-negotiable)

Preferred Qualifications (Bonus, Not Required)

Previous experience in appointment setting, telemarketing, cold calling, or lead generation

Experience using CRMs or dialers such as Vicidial, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar

Experience booking appointments for industries like roofing, solar, real estate, insurance, or home services

Agents will be evaluated based on:



Call volume per day

Talk time consistency

Appointment booking rate

Show-up rate (quality of booked appointments)

Script adherence & professionalism

CRM accuracy and note-taking

Attendance and schedule reliability

Work Schedule

Full-Time (40 hours per week)

Fixed schedule shifts available

Must be able to work U.S. business hours

Overtime may be available depending on performance and campaign demand

Compensation (Commission-Based)

This is a commission-only position. Agents are paid based on performance and successful appointment outcomes.



Earn per appointment booked (qualified appointments only)

Additional performance incentives may be available based on weekly/monthly results

High performers can earn significantly more than fixed hourly roles

Consistent leads and calling system provided by the company

Commission is calculated based on campaign rules and appointment quality standards.



Equipment Requirements

Applicants must have:



Laptop/Desktop computer (Windows preferred)

USB headset with noise cancellation

Reliable internet connection (minimum recommended: 20 Mbps download / 5 Mbps upload)

Quiet work environment (no background noise)

Training & Onboarding

Paid training (if applicable)

Script + objection handling training

Live call monitoring and coaching

Continuous improvement training weekly

Why Work With Optimist Global Services

Stable campaign opportunity

Clear growth path into leadership

Structured call center environment (not disorganized freelance work)

Professional team support and coaching

Performance-based recognition and bonuses

Application Requirements

To apply, please submit:



Updated resume

Short voice recording (optional but strongly recommended)

Answer the screening questions in the application

title: Social Media Content Creator/Graphic Designer
description:
We are a US-based digital marketing agency called Pure Growth Media, headquartered in Saint Paul, Minnesota. We help service businesses and brands grow through paid social advertising, content strategy, and creative execution. We've generated over $4 million in revenue for our clients — and we're growing fast.

We are looking for a talented, reliable, and detail-oriented Social Media Graphic Designer to join our remote team on a full-time basis.

This is not a one-off project. This is a long-term role with consistent work, stable pay, and real growth opportunity.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

You will be the creative backbone of our client accounts. Your primary job is to design high-quality visual content that stops the scroll, communicates clearly, and drives results for real businesses.

On a monthly basis, you will produce:



Instagram and LinkedIn carousels (5–8 slides per carousel)

Instagram and
 Stories (vertical format)

Static single-image posts and quote graphics

 and Meta ad creatives (multiple sizes per concept)

Infographics and branded content across platforms



You will work across multiple client accounts simultaneously, each with their own brand guidelines, color palettes, and visual identity. You must be able to switch between brands cleanly and consistently.

You will also:



Adapt and resize graphics for each platform's required dimensions

Organize and deliver files clearly and on time

Incorporate feedback efficiently without needing multiple rounds of revision

Communicate proactively — if something is unclear, ask before you guess





WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU

Required:



A strong portfolio showing real social media work — specifically carousels, stories, and ad creatives (not just logos or print design)

Proficiency in Canva. Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, and/or Figma

Clear understanding of how design performs differently on Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and Meta ads

Strong written English — you will communicate with our team daily

Consistent reliability — deadlines matter here



A plus (not required):



Basic video editing or motion graphics skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, After Effects)

Experience working with a US or international marketing agency

Understanding of what makes an ad creative perform vs. what just looks nice





WHAT WE OFFER

A respectful working relationship — we don't micromanage and we don't ask for unlimited revisions

Direct communication with leadership — you will always know where you stand

Room to grow as the agency grows





HOW TO APPLY

To show us you have read this entire post and pay attention to detail — which matters greatly in this role — please include the word SCROLL in the subject line of your application.

In your message, please include:



A short introduction — who you are, how long you have been designing, and what you enjoy most about social media creative work

A link to your portfolio (must include carousel and story examples — applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed)

Your expected monthly salary

Your availability — when can you start, and what hours do you prefer to work?



Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete a small paid test project ($50 USD) before a final offer is made. This is how we confirm the fit is right for both of us.

We look forward to seeing your work.

— Christian Yang, Founder

Pure Growth Media

title: Lead Generator (Find REAL Buyers | Calls + Outreach | Long-Term Role)
description:
???? Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist (Beauty Industry | Remote)



Company: Twirly

Location: Remote (Global)

Industry: Beauty, Cosmetics, Product Sourcing



About Us



Twirly is a UK-based company with operational offices in China, specialising in product sourcing and design within the beauty industry.



We work across a wide range of categories including:



Nails & eyelashes

Beauty devices (e.g. RF machines, facial tools)

Skincare products (e.g. masks, peptides)

Custom product development and private label sourcing



We connect international brands with high-quality manufacturing and innovative product solutions.



Role Overview



We are looking for a proactive Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist to help expand our global client base.



This role focuses on identifying, contacting, and qualifying potential clients in the beauty and cosmetics sector.



You will act as the first point of contact, helping us build relationships with brands, salons, distributors, and e-commerce businesses worldwide.



Key Responsibilities

Research and identify potential clients (brands, salons, wholesalers, distributors)

Generate high-quality leads across multiple regions (US, UK, EU, Australia, etc.)

Conduct outreach via:



LinkedIn

Phone calls (where required)

Present our services clearly and professionally

Qualify leads and pass strong opportunities to the core team

Maintain organised records of outreach and responses

Ideal Candidate

Strong communication skills in English (spoken and written)

Confident in outreach and relationship-building

Experience in lead generation, sales, or business development

Comfortable speaking with international clients

Self-driven, organised, and results-oriented

Experience in the beauty or cosmetics industry is a plus (not required)

What We’re Looking For



We are not just hiring for a task — we are looking for someone who can grow with the business and help shape our outreach strategy.



This is an opportunity to work closely with an international team and contribute to building a global sourcing brand.



How to Apply



Please include:



A brief introduction about yourself

Your experience with lead generation or outreach

Examples of past work or results (if available)

A short voice note or video introducing yourself (preferred)

Important



We are focused on finding the right person, not just filling a role.

Successful applicants may be offered long-term collaboration and growth opportunities.



Quick Platform Tweaks (Optional)



Upwork Title:



Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist (Beauty Industry | Remote | Long-Term)



OnlineJobs.ph Title:



Lead Generation Specialist (Calls + Outreach | Beauty Industry | Long-Term Role)



HubSpot (More Corporate):



Business Development & Lead Generation Specialist – Global Beauty Sourcing



Confidence Level



0.93



Key Caveats

You may want to adjust tone slightly per platform (OnlineJobs.ph = simpler, more direct)

If calling is a major requirement, specify expected hours/time zones

If commission/bonus is planned, adding it later will significantly increase applicant quality

I think you've limited yourself there in terms of the categories. I think we cover all beauty environments, so I would expand on that a little.It could be accessories, scents, facial serums, you can get absolutely anything in beauty, health, environment, scents, all sorts.Also, I'd like you to mention something around the lines of, like, the role that we're looking for is somebody to get actual hot leads and then bring them to us so we can then do quotations. So it's hot leads to quotations so I can do quotation level.



Here’s a stronger, expanded version with broader scope and a clear “hot leads ? quotation stage” focus:



???? Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist (Beauty, Health & Lifestyle | Remote)



Company: Twirly

Location: Remote (Global)

Industry: Beauty, Health, Lifestyle, Product Sourcing



About Us



Twirly is a UK-based company with operational offices in China, specialising in end-to-end product sourcing and design across the global beauty and health industry.



We don’t limit ourselves to one niche — we work across the full beauty ecosystem, including:



Nails, eyelashes, and accessories

Skincare (serums, masks, peptides, treatments)

Beauty devices (RF machines, facial tools, equipment)

Fragrance and scent-based products

Health & wellness items

Packaging and private label product development

Custom-designed products across any beauty category



If a brand can imagine it, we can source and build it.



Role Overview



We are looking for a high-performing Lead Generation & Outreach Specialist focused on delivering qualified, ready-to-convert opportunities.



This is not just general lead generation — your role is to identify and engage serious buyers and bring them to a stage where they are ready for us to quote and close.



???? Your core objective:

Generate “hot leads” ? pass to our team for quotation and deal conversion



Key Responsibilities

Identify and research potential clients globally:

Beauty brands

Salons and clinics

E-commerce businesses

Distributors and wholesalers

Conduct targeted outreach via:



LinkedIn

Phone / direct contact (where appropriate)

Engage prospects and qualify real buying intent

Move leads beyond interest into quotation-ready stage

Clearly communicate Twirly’s sourcing and product capabilities

Maintain structured tracking of outreach, responses, and lead quality

What We Mean by “Hot Leads”



We are specifically looking for leads who:



Are actively looking to source or develop products

Have clear product ideas or requirements

Are ready (or close to ready) to receive quotations

Show genuine commercial intent (not just browsing or curiosity)

Ideal Candidate

Strong spoken and written English

Proven experience in lead generation, outreach, or sales

Confident communicator — able to speak with international clients

Skilled at identifying buying signals and intent

Self-motivated and results-driven

Organised and able to manage outreach pipelines



Bonus (not required):



Experience in beauty, cosmetics, or health industries

Experience with sourcing, manufacturing, or B2B sales

What We’re Looking For



We are building something long-term.

We want someone who understands that quality of leads matters more than quantity and can consistently deliver conversion-ready opportunities.



How to Apply



Please include:



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with lead generation/outreach

Examples of results (e.g. leads generated, deals supported)

A short voice note or video introducing yourself (preferred)

Important



We are not focused on filling a position quickly — we are focused on finding the right person to grow with us.



Strong performers will have opportunities for long-term collaboration and expanded responsibilities.

title: Short term Rental VA Manager
description:
Senior Virtual Assistant – Short-Term Rental (STR) Specialist



We are a fast-growing short-term rental management company seeking an experienced Senior Virtual Assistant with proven experience in the STR industry.



This is not an entry-level role. Applicants must already be proficient in the key platforms and processes used in professional property management.



Required Platform Experience



Applicants must have demonstrated experience using:



• Hostaway PMS

• PriceLabs dynamic pricing

• Airbnb

• Booking.com

• Stayz / VRBO

• Google Vacation Rentals

• TouchStay guidebooks

• Canva

• Social media management (Instagram &
)



Key Responsibilities



• Guest communication and reservation management

• Managing listing performance across multiple OTA platforms

• Listing optimisation (titles, descriptions, photo ordering, SEO)

• PriceLabs monitoring and pricing adjustments

• Creating and updating TouchStay digital guidebooks

• Managing Airbnb damage claims and resolution cases

• Understanding and enforcing cancellation policies and platform protocols

• Identifying opportunities to improve listing visibility and conversion

• Creating basic marketing content using Canva and social media



Required Skills



The successful candidate must:



• Be highly proactive and able to identify improvements independently

• Have strong knowledge of Airbnb protocols, policies and guest management

• Understand listing optimisation and search ranking factors

• Be confident managing damage claims, guest issues and cancellation policies

• Have excellent written English and professional communication skills

• Be organised, reliable and detail-focused



Availability



• Minimum availability: 8 hours per day

• Must be responsive during working hours



Important



This role is suited to someone already working within the short-term rental or Airbnb management industry.



Applicants without direct STR platform experience will not be considered.

title: Prop Firm Trader (FX / Futures / Crypto)
description:
Hello Traders!



Isla Capital is growing — and we’re looking to bring on disciplined, serious traders to join our team of elite traders.



We work with experienced prop firm traders to trade evaluation and funded accounts through firms such as FTMO, Apex, Alpha Capital Group, and similar platforms.



This opportunity is designed for Filipino professionals who understand prop firm rules, respect risk, and can trade with consistency and control.



This is not a casual trading role — it is a structured, performance-driven environment with a clear path toward higher earnings and long-term growth. Over time, this role will expand into live portfolio trading, where earning potential increases significantly.



What You’ll Do...



• Trade prop firm evaluation (challenge) accounts and funded accounts

• Strictly follow all prop firm rules and drawdown limits

• Maintain daily trading journals

• Provide consistent performance updates



What We’re Looking For...



• Experience trading prop firm accounts

• Strong risk management and discipline

• Ability to work independently

• Honest and reliable communication

• Understanding of scalping and/or day trading strategies



Compensation & Growth...



• Weekly base salary potential

• Bonus for passing evaluations / challenges

• Profit sharing on funded account payouts

• Performance bonuses based on payout milestones

• Access to in-house coaching from experienced traders

>> Upon certain milestones, we will also purchase additional prop accounts with copy trade software to multiply earnings



Important Notes...



• Accounts must be registered under the trader’s name (per prop firm rules), but all accounts and profits are part of Isla Capital

• All prop firm fees and account costs are fully covered by Isla Capital

• Strict confidentiality is required



Who This Is For...



This is a performance-first opportunity for traders who take their craft seriously.



We are building a system where disciplined Filipino traders can earn meaningful income and grow long-term within a structured trading environment.



If you are consistent, controlled, and committed — this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply...



Please apply and include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your prop firm experience

• Your trading style and psychology

• Resume or link to resume (if available)



Let's build something serious together!

title: Marketing Analyst (Remote Part time)
description:
Marketing Analyst



Part-time (20 hrs/week) · Remote — Vietnam (UTC+7 overlap required)



Range Salary: 4$-7$/ hours



Please apply this form: 





About the role



Wet are entering a structured growth phase post-acquisition. You will build and own the analytics infrastructure that tells us whether marketing efforts are working — connecting data from Google Analytics, Klaviyo, ChargeBee/Stripe, and Shopify into clear weekly and monthly reporting. You will work closely with the Marketing Manager and report directly to the owner.

Schedule & availability



Daily standup (15 min): required attendance, Monday–Friday



Working meeting availability: 7:00 AM – 9:00 AM PST, Monday–Friday

Overlap window aligns with Seattle HQ (Renton, WA). All other hours are async-flexible.





What you’ll own



Reporting & dashboards



Build and maintain a weekly marketing dashboard covering: organic traffic, trial signups, MRR movements,
 performance, Shopify merchant growth, and paid channel CAC

Produce a monthly growth report with trend analysis and actionable recommendations

Own Google Analytics 4 configuration — goals, conversion events, UTM standards

Data sources



Google Analytics & Search Console — organic traffic, keyword performance, landing page conversion

Klaviyo —
 open/click/revenue attribution, list health, unsubscribe trends

ChargeBee / Stripe — MRR, churn, LTV, cohort retention, trial conversion rate

Shopify App Analytics — installs, active merchants, plan distribution, review trends

Competitor research — track positioning, new features, and pricing moves across Viral Sweep, Giveaway Ninja, and Gleam

Campaign & SEO analysis



Track SEO keyword rankings and organic growth week-over-week

Analyze paid campaign performance (Google Ads / Meta Ads): CTR, CPC, conversion rate, CAC

Attribute revenue to marketing channels and campaigns where possible

Run A/B test analysis and report statistical significance

Required



2+ years in a marketing analytics or growth analytics role

Google Analytics 4 — comfortable building reports, events, and funnels from scratch

Spreadsheet fluency (Google Sheets / Excel) — cohort tables, pivot analysis, charting

Experience pulling and interpreting data from SaaS billing platforms (Stripe, ChargeBee, or equivalent)

Clear written English — your reports will be read by a non-technical owner

Ability to work independently with minimal direction

Nice to have



Looker Studio (Google Data Studio) or equivalent BI tool for dashboard builds

Klaviyo analytics — revenue attribution, flow performance

Basic SQL for querying databases directly

Familiarity with Shopify app metrics and App Store dynamics

Experience with affiliate or referral program tracking

Proficiency with AI productivity tools (e.g. ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) for drafting, research, summarization, and day-to-day task acceleration

Compensation



Depends upon experience.

title: Product Lister (Remote)
description:
Job Description – Product Lister (Remote)



We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Product Lister to join our e-commerce team. In this role, you will be responsible for uploading and managing products on our online store, ensuring that every listing is accurate, well-presented, and ready to convert.



What you will be doing:

Product uploading: Adding new products to the webshop in an accurate and timely manner, including all relevant product information such as titles, descriptions, images, sizes, colors, and variants.

Product descriptions: Writing or editing clear and appealing product descriptions that reflect the style and tone of our brand.

Pricing & sizing: Updating and adjusting prices and size information where needed, ensuring everything is correct and up to date.

Product maintenance: Reviewing and improving existing listings, fixing errors, and keeping the store neat and consistent.

Image management: Uploading and organizing product images in the correct format and order.



What we are looking for:



Experience: Previous experience with Shopify or a similar e-commerce platform is a plus. Experience with e-commerce dropshipping stores is a strong advantage. 

Attention to detail: Accuracy is everything in this role. Organized: Able to manage multiple products and priorities at once. 

Fluent in English: A strong command of written English is essential, as you will be writing and editing product descriptions that need to read naturally and professionally. 

Good communication: Responsive and clear in communication. Able to identify specific areas where feedback can be provided—in other words, be proactive.

Independent: Able to work autonomously and meet deadlines without constant supervision.



This is a remote position. We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to grow alongside fast-moving e-commerce store(s).



Ready to apply? Please fill in our application form below:

title: Amazon Client Acquisition Specialist (PL & PPC Lead Gen)
description:
We are a growing Amazon agency looking for a proactive and results-driven Amazon Client Acquisition Specialist from the Philippines to join our team. Your primary role will be to identify, contact, and secure new clients—specifically Amazon Private Label sellers and brands who need expert management for their Amazon PPC and overall account growth.



This is a unique role that blends lead generation, sales, and a strong understanding of the Amazon ecosystem. You will be the first point of contact for potential clients, helping us expand our portfolio and provide valuable services to sellers looking to scale.



Responsibilities:

Lead Generation & Prospecting

Outbound Sales & Outreach

Relationship Building

Market Research

Reporting



Required Skills & Qualifications:

roven experience in sales, business development, or lead generation, specifically for Amazon services (e.g., PPC management, account management, listing optimization).

Strong understanding of Amazon Private Label (PL) and FBA business models. You should know what a PL seller's world looks like and speak their language.

Familiarity with Amazon PPC (campaign types, key metrics like ACOS/ROAS) is a major advantage, as it will enable you to confidently discuss our services with potential clients.



Excellent written and verbal English communication skills with a neutral accent.

Proficiency with sales and research tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator,
 automation tools, and CRM software.

Self-motivated, organized, and results-oriented. You are comfortable working independently and managing your own pipeline.

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated workspace for remote work.

title: Full-Time AI Video Editor (Kling AI + Nano Banana)
description:
About the role



We are looking for a full-time AI video editor who can take detailed scripts and storyboards and turn them into polished, ready-to-publish videos — fast and consistently, every single day.

The videos are made entirely from AI-generated footage produced in Kling AI. We provide the prompts and storyboards — your job is to run those prompts, generate the footage, and edit everything into a cohesive final video. You won't be writing scripts or coming up with concepts. Your job is pure execution.



What you will deliver



A minimum of 2 videos per day, each with 3 variations — every working day

AI-generated footage produced in Kling AI using our prompts and storyboards as the source material

AI image assets created in Nano Banana per our creative direction

Fully edited videos with captions, music, sound effects, and motion as briefed

Exports in the correct specs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube



Requirements



Hands-on experience with Kling AI (mandatory — no exceptions)

Experience with Nano Banana / kie.ai or similar AI image generation tools

Proficient in a video editing suite — CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

Able to maintain high output quality at consistent daily volume

Strong eye for pacing, transitions, text placement, and audio sync

Reliable internet connection and stable work setup

Comfortable working fully async from written and visual briefs



Bonus (not required)



Experience editing paid social ad content for Meta or TikTok

Familiarity with native advertising or advertorial-style video formats

Comfortable with async tools like Notion, Slack, or Loom



Good to know



This is not a creative director role. You will not be writing scripts or coming up with concepts — that is handled on our side. If you thrive on clear briefs and fast execution, you will fit right in. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a short call before anything is confirmed.



How to apply



Send a message with the subject line "AI Video Editor – Ready" and include:

2–3 video examples you have edited — links or file attachments (required, no exceptions)

Your experience level with Kling AI and Nano Banana

Your typical daily output and the editing software you use

Your availability and preferred working hours



Applications without video examples will not be reviewed.

title: Head of Customer Service - Ecommerce Health Brand
description:
For a health brand, we're seeking a Head of Customer Service to lead and build our customer support team. You'll use Gorgias to manage customer inquiries, resolve issues, and maintain exceptional customer satisfaction for our natural soap and probiotic products across UK, EU, US, and Nordic markets.

This is a leadership role - you'll be responsible for recruiting, training, and managing customer service agents, getting them up to speed without my involvement. You'll provide daily reports using templates and ensure the team runs smoothly 7 days a week. Once the team is self-sufficient, you can take 1 day off per week.



Work Culture: We're results-focused and trust our leaders to run their departments independently. Meet your targets for customer satisfaction and team performance, and you have full autonomy. We offer performance-based bonuses for exceptional results.



Important Note: We're in the orientation phase building our full team. We want to see your experience, recommendations from previous roles, and understand your rates before making commitments. This could lead to a long-term leadership position.



To Apply: Share your experience managing customer service teams, Gorgias expertise, references/recommendations, and your hourly rate.

title: Meta Ads Designer - Ecommerce Specialist
description:
For a health brand, we're looking for someone who can help us create static creatives to advertise on META based on our Clickup briefings. We need a designer with extensive experience in ecommerce advertising who understands what makes ads convert. You should be comfortable working with all Meta ad formats - static images, carousels, video, stories, and reels. Our products include natural soaps and probiotics, and we're expanding across UK, EU, US, and Nordic markets.



Work Culture: We're flexible and results-focused - not the type to micromanage. As long as you meet the desired output, everything is fine. Need to take a day off? No problem. We offer performance-based bonuses and believe in rewarding great work.



Important Note: We're currently in the orientation phase as we're planning to build out a complete marketing team. We want to see portfolios and understand your rates before making any commitments. If there's a good fit, this could lead to ongoing collaboration as part of our expanded team.



To Apply: Share your portfolio including Meta ad examples with performance data, and include your hourly rate.

description:

, LinkedIn).

title: Email marketing operator for fast-growing fitness brand
description:
We are looking for a Klaviyo
 marketing operator to help scale our
 channel further. Who are we? Golden Grip is a premium fitness brand focused on grip strength, forearm training, and armwrestling equipment.



We serve mostly:

- Strongman athletes

- Armwrestlers

- Bodybuilders

- Fitness enthousiasts

That we help to level-up their grip strength and take their forearms to the next level.



We already have:

- A strong brand

- Clear positioning

- Existing flows (welcome + abandoned cart)

- Large contact list (15.000+)



What we need is someone who can execute, build, and optimize our
 marketing. This includes:

- Build new flows and optimize current ones

- Help with campaign strategy and content ideas

- Campaign execution (setting up, scheduling, designing, copywriting)

- Segmentation & optimization of audiences



Who we are looking for:

- Strong experience with Klaviyo and Shopify ecommerce

- Affinity with fitness / strength sports is a huge plus

title: Online Arbitrage Sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE 

Looking to grow our team seeking one full time position who will undergo a trial period of one week paid before being brought on as full time. 



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long-term, advancing position, this is for you. 



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately. 



We are seeking a full time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher-paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application. 



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 8-12 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs. 



Requirements 

Keepa experience required 

Seller Amp (SAS) experience 

Online Arbitrage experience 

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank 

Ability to work full-time (40 hours per week) 

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits 

Unlimited PTO 

Holidays Off 

Bonuses which will be discussed 

Communication Skills 



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar team member we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. Discord will be required for team communications. 



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application. 

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link. 

This is our criteria. 

Low sales rank 

Minimum 35% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price 



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission. 

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer? 

If so, why did you leave your current candidate? 

What are your computer specs? 

How many monitors do you have? 

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates? 

What is your favorite sport and why ? 

Do you have a VPN already ? 

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



As well as answering those questions above, please upload a screenshot of your internet speed as well as a 20 second voice recording of why you would be a good fit for this opportunity.



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: Digital Marketing & Operations Associate
description:
## What You'll Do



### Content Publishing & Social Media (40%)



Publish pre-drafted content to LinkedIn,
/X, and Reddit on schedule. Manage the content calendar and scheduling tools. Repurpose long-form content into threads, carousels, and short posts. Execute a Reddit commenting strategy using the founder's voice and templates. Track engagement metrics and flag what's working.



###
 & Client Outreach (25%)



Send pitch
s and follow-ups from drafts. Manage the inbox — flag important replies, organize leads, schedule calls. Run DM outreach campaigns on LinkedIn and Instagram using templated messages you personalize. Coordinate client scheduling — calendar links, confirmations, reminders.



### Website & Tech Operations (20%)



Push website updates and fixes (basic git commands — we'll train you). Update landing pages and web content. Set up and manage tools like scheduling platforms,
 tools, and CRM. Keep the Notion workspace organized — task statuses, databases, project tracking.



### General Operations & Admin (15%)



Research tasks — competitor analysis, prospect lists, market trends. Prepare materials for calls. Document SOPs as you learn processes — you'll build the operations playbook. Handle ad-hoc tasks as they come up.



---



## Must-Haves



2+ years experience in digital marketing, social media management, AI understanding and desire to learn or virtual assistance. Strong written English — you'll post and
 on behalf of the brand. Comfortable with tools like Claude, Notion, Canva, Google Workspace, and social media platforms. Self-directed — you take a rough brief and figure out the details. Reliable and communicative — you ask when something's unclear and speak up when you're stuck. Available for 2-3 hours of overlap with US Pacific time is a plus.



## Nice-to-Haves



WordPress, basic HTML/CSS, or git experience (we'll train you either way). Familiarity with AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude — you'll use these daily. Background in coaching, personal development, or men's wellness.
 outreach campaign experience. Graphic design basics with Canva.



---



## What Success Looks Like



**Month 1** — You've taken over content publishing,
 sending, and basic admin. The founder is no longer hitting "post" or "send" on anything routine. You have SOPs documented for every recurring task.



**Month 2** — You're proactively managing the content calendar, outreach pipeline, and Notion workspace. You flag opportunities and problems before being asked. You're comfortable pushing website updates.



**Month 3** — The business runs smoothly even when the founder is unavailable for a day. You're managing 80% of daily execution independently.



---



 About ElevateAI



We're building an AI-powered platform and coaching business for men's coaches and small business owners. The business is growing across client services, a SaaS product, content marketing, and group coaching programs. Right now, the founder does everything — strategy, sales, content, website,
, admin. This hire changes that. You'll be the first team member, taking over daily execution so the business can scale.



## Compensation & Growth



Competitive salary for Philippines-based remote work (discussed in interview). Flexible schedule with core overlap hours. Direct mentorship from the founder — you'll learn AI, marketing, and business operations. Growth path into team lead or operations manager as the business scales. Daily work with cutting-edge AI tools and opportunity to learn them



---



## How to Apply



Send an
 with:



1. A brief intro — who you are and why this role interests you

2. Your resume or portfolio link. Share if you have built something

3. A 2-minute video introducing yourself and why you will be a great fit.

4. Your answer to: "Pick any brand on social media you think does content really well. What specifically do they do right?

5. Your experience with AI and desire to learn.



This is a great opportunity, if you are the right fit, you will be upgraded to full time and then as we grow you grow.

title: Substation Electrical Engineer
description:
• Coordinate with the Operations Officer and Supervisor for the services to be performed on site
